summary: The test suite covers core functionality (axes expansion, include/exclude, max-size validation, feature flags, strategy options) and includes workflow structure validation with act integration. However, it has notable gaps: several error conditions implemented in the code lack corresponding tests (feature-axis collision, invalid types for features/include/exclude, invalid max-parallel, non-dict config), and edge cases like boundary conditions are minimally covered. Design is clean with good separation between unit and integration tests, but has minor issues (unused `combos` variable, fixture files referenced without clear definition). The suite would catch regressions in happy paths but lacks the rigor to reliably detect edge case failures.
